configurations.name: Arduino: Derle + Yukle + Arayuz
configurations.command: PORT=$(ls /dev/cu.usbserial-* 2>/dev/null | head -1) && [ -n "$PORT" ] && arduino-cli compile --fqbn arduino:avr:nano ${workspaceFolder} && arduino-cli upload -p $PORT --fqbn arduino:avr:nano ${workspaceFolder} && open ${workspaceFolder}/arayuz.html
